cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Richard could have gone to the basketball court. The problem gives us several pieces of information, so I need to go through each one carefully. First, Richard woke up at 5am. That means he wasn't up before that, so he couldn't have done anything before 5am. But waking up doesn't necessarily mean he was doing something immediately; he might have taken some time to get ready. Next, Elizabeth saw Richard taking photos near the Leaning Tower of Pisa from 5am to 7am. So during that two-hour window, he was definitely at the Leaning Tower of Pisa. Therefore, he couldn't have been at the basketball court during that time because he was photographed elsewhere. Then there's Lisa, who saw Richard fixing their computer at the electronic store from 3pm to 7pm. So from 3pm to 7pm, he was at the store working on a computer. That blocks off that entire four-hour period as well. He couldn't have gone to the basketball court during those hours because he was busy at the store. Leslie saw Richard reading at the library from 7pm to 8pm. The basketball court was closed after 8pm. So, if the court was closed after 8pm, Richard would have to be there before that. But Leslie saw him at the library from 7pm to 8pm, so he couldn't have been at the basketball court during that time either. Now, let's consider the timeline: - Before 5am: Richard was asleep, so he couldn't have gone to the court. - 5am to 7am: He was at the Leaning Tower of Pisa, so not available. - 7am to 3pm: This is a window where there's no reported activity. After 7am, he's free until 3pm when he goes to the electronic store. So from 7am to 3pm, he's not accounted for. - 3pm to 7pm: At the electronic store. - 7pm to 8pm: At the library. - After 8pm: The basketball court is closed, so even if he had time, he couldn't go. The basketball court is open until 8pm. So the possible times he could have gone would be between when he's free and before the court closes. Since he's free from 7am to 3pm, and then again from 7pm to 8pm, but during 7pm to 8pm he's at the library. So the only time he's free is from 7am to 3pm. Therefore, the possible window is 7am to 3pm. Looking at the options: A) 3pm to 7pm – He was at the store during this time. Not possible. B) 5am to 7am – He was at the Leaning Tower. Not
